description_long: This coatrack features a robust, vertical metal frame with multiple evenly spaced hooks protruding from both sides, designed for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The main structure consists of two sturdy vertical posts connected by horizontal bars, providing stability and a classic, utilitarian appearance. The hooks are tubular and rounded at the ends to prevent damage to garments. The top of the coatrack is capped with a slightly thicker section, possibly for added strength or a decorative touch. The finish is a uniform glossy black, giving it a sleek and modern look suitable for urban environments. There are no visible decorative elements or umbrella holders, emphasizing its functional, minimalist design.
description: A tall, black metal coatrack with multiple side hooks and a sturdy, minimalist frame, finished in glossy black. It is designed for practical use in urban settings, with a focus on durability and simplicity.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile and the alignment of hooks extending outward from the central post.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the full width, vertical bars, and the arrangement of hooks on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and hook arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing the vertical bars and symmetrical hook placement.
